political.s: Cabela's historical PAC donations showed 94% support for Republicans from 1990-2016. As a private company since 2017 acquisition by Bass Pro Shops, direct political contributions have ceased. Both companies maintain neutral formal political policies.

charity.s: Bass Pro Shops and Cabela's donated over $100 million to conservation, community and outdoor education programs in the past five years. The Bass Pro Shops and Cabela's Outdoor Fund, a 501(c)(3), supports wildlife habitat conservation, youth outdoor engagement, and military/veteran support with 97 cents of every dollar going to conservation efforts.
charity.focus: Conservation, wildlife habitat, youth outdoor education, military/veteran support

environment.s: Bass Pro Shops appointed a Chief Sustainability Officer in 2021 and established sustainability initiatives across manufacturing, supply chain and operations. The company leads conservation efforts through the Johnny Morris Conservation Foundation and operates major wildlife attractions like Wonders of Wildlife Museum & Aquarium.

labor.s: Bass Pro Shops settled a $10.5 million EEOC race discrimination case in 2017 for alleged hiring discrimination against African Americans and Hispanics. Cabela's had a similar EEOC settlement in 2015. Both companies agreed to strengthen diversity hiring practices and established diversity/inclusion leadership positions.

dei.s: Both Bass Pro Shops and Cabela's maintain DEI initiatives and programs. Cabela's has a 3.2/5 DEI rating on Glassdoor. Following EEOC settlements, both companies implemented diversity hiring practices and community youth engagement programs including the Outdoor Adventurers initiative reaching urban youth.

animals.s: Not applicable. Cabela's and Bass Pro Shops are retailers and manufacturers of outdoor sporting goods, hunting/fishing equipment, and boats. They do not conduct animal testing.

guns.s: Bass Pro Shops and Cabela's are major retailers of firearms and ammunition as well as hunting, fishing and outdoor recreation equipment. Gun sales represent a core business function for both brands.

privacy.s: Limited public information available on comprehensive data privacy practices. As a private company, Bass Pro Shops does not disclose detailed privacy policies. Cabela's maintains standard retail privacy practices typical for e-commerce operations.

execPay.s: Prior to acquisition, Cabela's CEO was entitled to $8 million in severance; other executives received $2.6-3.6 million. Current Bass Pro Shops leadership structure is private. Average employee pay ranges from $28,000-$32,000 annually while senior management earns $100,000+.

sec.note: Pay ratio extracted from proxy filing — verify manually for accuracy
